title: Draft CONTRIBUTING.md File
description: Create an initial CONTRIBUTING.md file outlining contribution guidelines for the agent-ui project.
details: Write a CONTRIBUTING.md file at the root of the repository. Include sections on code style (TypeScript, Prettier, ESLint), pull request process, issue reporting, commit message conventions, and local testing requirements. Reference the project's use of Next.js, TypeScript, and global CSS. Emphasize accessibility, performance, and type safety as per PRD. Include links to relevant documentation (Next.js, TypeScript, Prettier, ESLint).
test_strategy: Review the CONTRIBUTING.md file for completeness, clarity, and alignment with project standards. Ask a team member to follow the guide for a sample contribution and provide feedback.

title: Review and Refine Contribution Guide
description: Ensure the CONTRIBUTING.md file is accurate, clear, and actionable for new contributors.
details: Proofread the CONTRIBUTING.md file for clarity and accuracy. Validate that all instructions are up-to-date with current project practices. Adjust sections as needed for completeness (e.g., clarify code formatting, testing steps, or PR review process).
test_strategy: Have at least one developer unfamiliar with the project review the guide and attempt to follow it for a mock contribution. Gather feedback and make necessary improvements.
